channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1384 BRISTOW STREET, Apt 4D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE PROVIDE TEMPORARY PLYWOOD SEAL-UP TO ALL ACCESSIBLE OPENING DUE TO RECENT FIRE IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 4D, 4th STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 31 WEST TREMONT AVENUE, Apt 6I, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE HINGES AT DOOR IN THE ENTRANCE LOCATED AT APT 6I, 6th STORY, 6th APARTMENT FROM EAST AT SOUTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 662 EAST 21 STREET, BROOKLYN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2043.1 HMC INSTALL THE MISSING OR REPAIR/REPLACE THE DEFECTIVE WINDOW GUARD(S) THROUGHOUT THE PUBLIC AREAS IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SPECIFICATIONS OF THE NEW YORK CITY HEALTH CODE SECTION 24 RCNY CHAPTER 12.

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 141 BEACH 56 PLACE, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
567 (C) § 27-2017, 27-2017.1, 27-2017.4, 27-2017.5, 27-2017.8, 27-2019, 27-2021 HMC: ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF EVIDENCE OF RATS AND ALL UNDERLYING CAUSES CREATING THE PEST INFESTATIONS, BY USING INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT (IPM), ELIMINATE ALL BURROW ENTRY AND PASSAGEWAYS, PEST NESTS, HOLES, GAPS OR CRACKS IN WALLS, CEILINGS, FLOORS, FIXING LEAKS AND MANAGING GARBAGE IN PUBLIC AREAS. EVIDENC

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 31 WEST TREMONT AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 18 MERCER STREET, Apt 3, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE GLASS PANE AT LOWER SASH AT 1ST WINDOW FROM SOUTH AT WEST IN THE KITCHEN LOCATED AT APT 3, 3rd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM WEST AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2087 CRESTON AVENUE, Apt 3F, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
HMC ADM CODE: § 27-2017.4 ABATE THE INFESTATION CONSISTING OF MICE IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 3F, 3rd STORY, 2nd APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 34-26 41 STREET, Apt 1F, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE MORTISE LOCK ASSEMBLY AT DOOR IN THE ENTRANCE LOCATED AT APT 1F, 1st STORY, SECTION AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 34-26 41 STREET, Apt 1F, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE & 309 M/D LAW ABATE THE NUISANCE CONSISTING OF HOTWATER EXCEEDING THE MAXIMUM ALLOWABLE TEMPERATURE OF 130 DEGREES AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 1F, 1st STORY, SECTION AT NORTH

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 412 WEST 129 STREET, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2033 ADM CODE PROVIDE READY ACCESS TO BUILDINGS HEATING SYSTEM DOOR LOCKED AT CELLAR AT BOILER ROOM

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1001 EAST 167 STREET, Apt 2E, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.7 ADM CODE: CORRECT FAILURE TO PROVIDE TO THE DEPARTMENT WITHIN 45 DAYS OF DEMAND ALL RECORDS REQUIRED TO BE MAINTAINED BY OWNER PURSUANT TO LOCAL LAW 1 OF 2004 RELATED TO LEAD-BASED PAINT NOTICES, INSPECTIONS AND REMEDIATION/ABATEMENT ACTIVITIES.
